facial_anchors.mask: None, but often obscured by a conical bamboo hat (douli) and shadows
facial_anchors.features: Sharp, cold, stoic Asian male face, unseen eyes under the hat brim
facial_anchors.skin: Fair but rugged, often in low-light/shadowed conditions

costume_anchors.outer: Tattered, layered dark grey/black robes, worn-out linen, weathered and battle-damaged edges
costume_anchors.headgear: Traditional conical bamboo hat (douli), worn low to hide the face
costume_anchors.arms: Tight dark bandages/wraps on the forearms
costume_anchors.weapon: Zhelong (蛰龙) - sleeve-hidden three-edged dagger, matte black finish, non-reflective

visual_quality_spec: 8K Masterpiece, 35mm film grain, Low-key photography, high contrast shadows, volumetric mist/fog (bamboo forest setting), Tyndall effect through bamboo leaves, high-texture detail on tattered linen.
